ddls:
CREATE TABLE "distance_bands" (
  "distance_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance band */,
  "distance_range" TEXT /* Range of the distance band (e.g., 0-3 km) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance band */,
  "min_distance" INTEGER /* Minimum distance of the band */,
  "max_distance" INTEGER /* Maximum distance of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_preferences" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel preference record */,
  "distance_band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distance band */,
  "proportion_in_distance_band" REAL /* Proportion of travelers in the distance band */,
  "all_travels" INTEGER /* Total number of travels in the distance band */,
  "trimode_travels" INTEGER /* Number of travels using multiple modes */,
  "walk_base_travels" INTEGER /* Number of base walks */,
  "cycle_base_travels" INTEGER /* Number of base cycles */,
  "drive_base_travels" INTEGER /* Number of base drives */,
  "other_base_travels" INTEGER /* Number of base other travels */,
  "walk_goactive_travels" INTEGER /* Number of active walks */,
  "cycle_goactive_travels" INTEGER /* Number of active cycles */,
  "drive_goactive_travels" INTEGER /* Number of active drives */,
  "other_goactive_travels" INTEGER /* Number of active other travels */,
  "percent_walk_base" REAL /* Percentage of base walks */,
  "percent_cycle_base" REAL /* Percentage of base cycles */,
  "percent_drive_base" REAL /* Percentage of base drives */,
  "percent_other_base" REAL /* Percentage of base other travels */,
  "percent_walk_goactive" REAL /* Percentage of active walks */,
  "percent_cycle_goactive" REAL /* Percentage of active cycles */,
  "percent_drive_goactive" REAL /* Percentage of active drives */,
  "percent_other_goactive" REAL /* Percentage of active other travels */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_distance_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_band_id") REFERENCES distance_bands ("distance_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel preference record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travel_preferences ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_data" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "distance_band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distance band */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Mode of travel (e.g., walk, cycle, drive, other) */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of travel (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Satisfaction score (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the respondent */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_satisfaction_score FOREIGN KEY ("satisfaction_score") REFERENCES satisfaction_scores ("score_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_travel_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("travel_frequency") REFERENCES travel_frequencies ("frequency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_travel_mode FOREIGN KEY ("travel_mode") REFERENCES travel_modes ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_distance_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_band_id") REFERENCES distance_bands ("distance_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the respondent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel mode (e.g., walk, cycle, drive, other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel mode */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the travel mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel frequency (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel frequency */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the travel frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction score */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the satisfaction score (1-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the satisfaction score */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color for the satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the status update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES transportation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES transportation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES project_tasks ("task_id")
)
